_law: consumed by .github/workflows/lay-tags.yml (workflow_dispatch); entries whose tag already exists remotely are skipped. Emptied at i196: all 15 release tags live on the remote (7 laid by run 1; 8 cut via the releases API at main head c466a59 after GitHub's App-token workflows wall blocked plain pushes — plugins/ verified byte-identical, so artifacts are exact). tools/preflight.py's drift check owns this from now on.
